name: My boss is mad I filed workers comp after work accident in West Valley City, is that legal retaliation?

mainEntity.name: My boss is mad I filed workers comp after work accident in West Valley City, is that legal retaliation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Retaliation is illegal; document and report to Utah Labor Commission immediately.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, employer retaliation for filing a legitimate workers' comp claim is illegal in Utah and can lead to additional claims for wrongful termination or discrimination. Utah law protects your right to benefits without fear of reprisal.[1] Key factors: proof of timing (claim followed by adverse action), your good faith filing, employer's knowledge; common retaliation includes firing, demotion, reduced hours. Document everything, report to Utah Labor Commission, file retaliation charge; legal help strengthens wrongful discharge case. Don't quit—fight protected activity.

description: Retaliation is illegal; document and report to Utah Labor Commission immediately.[1]
